patch.value: Resolve final Projects v2 review findings
Address all still-valid unresolved PR #28 review threads, verify the canceled lifecycle suggestion against pm CLI behavior, run the complete release gate, and close every thread with evidence.

Protocol downgrade guard, ambiguous status mapping, merged PR import, and external-data null safety have regression coverage; invalid feedback is documented; all tests and release checks pass; review threads are acknowledged and resolved.

author: codex
message: Add estimate and keep review follow-up top-level because the original feature is already closed

author: codex
message: Addressed all actionable PR #28 unresolved threads in the local branch (no GitHub reply/resolve). Fixed same-origin protocol/port guard (index.ts), status-mapping not-started false positive, merged-PR import state, nullable API collection entries (resolveOptionForStatus, indexPmByIssue, indexPmByProjectItem, indexProjectItemsByIssue, buildProjectPushPlan), and the close/canceled lifecycle via buildPullEntryArgs (canceled records --close-reason through pm update, preserving the distinct terminal state per pm CLI contracts; pm close only records closed and refuses terminal items). Raised docstring coverage from ~70% to 100% on index.ts/projects.ts. Full release gate green.

value.author: codex
value.text: Coordinator verification: git diff --check passed; npm run typecheck passed; npm test passed 82/82; npm run audit:prod found 0 vulnerabilities; pm-changelog check passed; npm pack dry-run contained 13 intended files. Local Greptile attempt b74b8871-8bd4-4721-ac4e-b86909d16295 excluded uncommitted files, so changes will be committed locally and reviewed by Greptile before push.

author: codex
message: Reopened for pre-push Greptile finding 49e67dcf: internal gh-project provenance tags must be excluded from GitHub export labels.

author: codex

patch.value: Greptile review 49e67dcf finding fixed: itemToGithubPayload now strips internal gh-project: provenance tags (in addition to gh: issue provenance) via parseProjectItemTag, using strict anchored matching so user labels that merely contain similar text (e.g. gh-project-notes) are preserved. Focused regression test added in test/smoke.test.ts covering an item carrying both issue and project provenance plus a look-alike user label. Gates: typecheck clean, 83/83 tests pass (was 82), audit 0 vulns, changelog up to date, pack dry-run ok. No commit/amend/push; left in progress for coordinator verification.

message: Fix Greptile 49e67dcf: strip gh-project: provenance tags in itemToGithubPayload

author: codex
message: Reopened for Greptile 2006f478 findings: paginate project list beyond 50 without silent truncation and refresh status on re-import.

author: agent-pi

patch.value: Greptile 2006f478 findings fixed production-grade: (1) runProjectList now paginates the GitHub Projects v2 projectsV2 connection beyond the first page for user and organization owners via pageInfo/endCursor threading with no silent truncation (collectProjectsV2Pages + listOwnerProjectsV2Nodes, first:100 pages); (2) project re-import update path now refreshes the mapped pm status alongside other fields via entry.mappedStatus, while preserving no-data-loss by skipping unknown/unmapped board statuses (no --status written). 13 focused pure/runtime tests added (multi-page listing + linked-item status refresh). Full release gate green: typecheck, build, 96/96 tests, 0 vulnerabilities, pack dry-run, changelog check. No commit/push/Greptile run per instructions.

Implemented Greptile review 2006f478: paginated Projects v2 listing (no silent truncation past 50) and re-import mapped-status refresh with skip-on-unknown-mapping no-data-loss invariant. 96/96 tests and every release gate pass.
